result.hypothesisAnalysis: The two baseline semantic walls, 'wall containing built-in AC unit' and 'wall containing sliding glass door', are clearly visible in the staged image. Their permanent architectural forms are preserved. However, the geometric visibility of the left edge of the 'wall containing sliding glass door' has changed; a corner and an adjoining return wall are now visible, which were not described as visible in the baseline.
